requirements_met: AC-001: Integration tests marker-gated and excluded from hermetic unit gate
AC-002: Real embed returns project-scoped, cosine-ranked results
AC-004: Budgeted assembly stays within token budget
AC-005: Probe-set harness runs and emits parity report
AC-006: Tests use throwaway, random-port instance
validation_results.test_output_summary: 49 tests passing, integration tests properly marker-gated
validation_results.code_quality: Integration tests follow established patterns: marker-gating, ephemeral fixtures, DeterministicWriter usage, real embed service integration
edge_cases_covered: Supersession exclusion both with and without include_superseded flag
Budget enforcement with real token measurement

criteria_verification.notes: All tests decorated with @pytest.mark.integration, pytest without -m integration deselected all 5 tests, pyproject.toml configured to exclude integration tests by default
test_real_embed_returns_project_scoped_ranked_results verifies project-scoping, cosine-ranked ordering, and most-relevant-first using real embed service and DeterministicWriter
test_supersession_exclusion_end_to_end writes v1 and v2 with supersession link, verifies both include_superseded=False (excludes v1) and include_superseded=True (includes both)
test_budgeted_assembly_respects_token_limit writes 10 documents, assembles with token_budget=200, verifies tokens_used <= 200 and validates coverage_score, context_block, contributing_types
test_probe_harness_runs_against_real_corpus executes run_probe_harness with frozen query set, verifies ParityReport structure including total_probes, divergences_count, full_parity, divergent_queries
All tests use ephemeral_pg fixture with UUID-based Docker Compose and random port allocation, test_ephemeral_fixture_uses_random_port verifies non-5432 port in range 1024-65536

rationale: All 6 acceptance criteria verified with concrete test evidence. Quality gates passed. Honesty verification clean (score 1.0, zero discrepancies). Integration tests properly implement marker-gating, ephemeral fixtures, supersession testing, budget enforcement, probe harness, and random-port isolation. The advisory regarding Phase 3 specialist invocation is non-blocking. Approval granted.
